description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Clang-Tidy Check that runs on every pull request. Use a matrix job that builds on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, install Python 3.7, restore Qt from cache, set up the Qt environment, install clang-tidy, and then configure CMake and build the project with clang-tidy enabled.
